text_original: In the highest antiquity, (the people) did not know that there were (their rulers).
text_normalized: In the highest antiquity, (the people) did not know that there were (their rulers).

text_original: In the next age they loved them and praised them.
text_normalized: In the next age they loved them and praised them.

text_original: In the next they feared them;
text_normalized: In the next they feared them;

text_original: in the next they despised them.
text_normalized: in the next they despised them.

text_original: Thus it was that when faith (in the Dao) was deficient (in the rulers) a want of faith in them ensued (in the people).
text_normalized: Thus it was that when faith (in the Dao) was deficient (in the rulers) a want of faith in them ensued (in the people).

text_original: How irresolute did those (earliest rulers) appear, showing (by their reticence) the importance which they set upon their words!
text_normalized: How irresolute did those (earliest rulers) appear, showing (by their reticence) the importance which they set upon their words!

text_original: Their work was done and their undertakings were successful, while the people all said, 'We are as we are, of ourselves!'
text_normalized: Their work was done and their undertakings were successful, while the people all said, 'We are as we are, of ourselves!'
